goal: Inline sm buttons (action + Retry) render in document flow; the genuine card-corner ✕ stays pinned — no buttons float to the viewport top-right corner at any width.
why: GAP 1 (HIGH): globals.css:324-325 makes .btn.sm position:absolute (authored only for the prep ✕ inside .crew-item{position:relative}). Phase 3 reused btn sm on 10 inline buttons whose containers are not positioned, so they float to the viewport top-right and overlap content. SC2 failed on Wiring=1 because the Retry button is visually unreachable.
success_criteria: .btn.sm is a static size modifier in globals.css — no position:absolute, no top/right; keeps min-height:44px.
.btn.close exists in globals.css with the absolute corner-pin behavior + min-height:44px.
The prep ✕ remove button uses btn danger close and stays corner-pinned inside .crew-item.
All 10 inline sm buttons render in document flow — none escape to the viewport top-right.

tasks.title: Split .btn.close (absolute corner) out of .btn.sm (static size modifier)
acceptance_criteria: .btn.sm has position:static and no top/right — size-only modifier keeping min-height:44px and small radius.
A new .btn.close rule exists with position:absolute; top:var(--sp-2); right:var(--sp-2); min-height:44px.
tasks.action: Edit .btn.sm at globals.css:324-332: remove position:absolute/top/right, add position:static, keep padding/font-size/min-height:44px/border-radius. Add a new .btn.close rule immediately after reproducing the OLD .btn.sm corner-pin behavior verbatim (position:absolute, top/right var(--sp-2), min-height:44px). Do not touch .crew-item.

args: test "$(awk '/^\.btn\.sm \{/{f=1} f{print} f&&/\}/{exit}' src/app/globals.css | grep -c 'position: absolute')" = 0

tasks.title: Migrate the genuine card-corner button (prep ✕) to .btn.close
acceptance_criteria: The prep ✕ remove button uses className="btn danger close" and stays corner-pinned in its crew-item card.
No other sm button in prep/emails/files is changed — the 10 inline buttons keep btn sm and now render in flow via T1.
The scheduled-Cancel button (emails/page.tsx:600) stays btn danger sm (inline .item grid cell, not a corner pin).
tasks.action: In src/app/prep/page.tsx, at the button opened on line 248 (child glyph ✕ on line 255, aria-label Remove ${r.name}), change className="btn danger sm" to className="btn danger close". Single targeted edit. Do not touch the Retry at line 207 or any button in emails/files.

args: test "$(grep -c 'btn danger close' src/app/emails/page.tsx)" = 0 && test "$(grep -c 'btn danger close' src/app/files/page.tsx)" = 0
